text:
やっほー！
もう浮上施設には行ってみた感じ？

せっかくだし、おねえさんと
一緒に行ってみない？

建物とか、障害物もあるみたいだし
特訓にはもってこいの場所！
……って感じがしない？

それじゃ、浮上施設での訓練。
がんばってみよう

Hey hey! So you've probably checked out the
Floating Facility already, huh?
Well hey, mind going along with me anyway?

I mean, look at all those buildings and
obstacles it's got and tell me you don't think
it's a perfect training ground!

Now, let's head to the Floating Facility so you
can show me your stuff!
